problem_text_cn: 1455 用实验的方法测量室温下浓度为百分之十的食盐水溶液的比热容。[可供仪器和用具] 物理天平、量热器、温度计、保温瓶、玻璃小烧杯2只、足量的水、冰、食盐和纱布。[要求] (1) 写出实验原理及步骤；(2) 测量并求得盐水溶液的比热容。
problem_text_en: 1455 Use an experimental method to measure the specific heat capacity of a 10% salt solution at room temperature. [Available instruments and tools] Physical balance, calorimeter, thermometer, thermos, 2 glass beakers, sufficient water, ice, salt and gauze. [Requirements] (1) Write down the experimental principle and steps; (2) Measure and find the specific heat capacity of the salt solution.
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】量热器内盛盐水冷却：$(m_2c_2 + q)\frac{\Delta \theta_2}{\Delta t} = -\alpha S(\theta_2 - \theta_0)^m$；换入同容积纯水冷却：$(m_1c_1 + q)\frac{\Delta \theta_1}{\Delta t} = -\alpha S(\theta_1 - \theta_0)^m$。在相同温度$\theta = \theta_3$时，$(m_1c_1 + q)\left.\frac{\Delta \theta_1}{\Delta t}\right|_{\theta=\theta_3} = (m_2c_2 + q)\left.\frac{\Delta \theta_2}{\Delta t}\right|_{\theta=\theta_3}$，整理得$c_2 = \frac{c_1m_1\left.\frac{\Delta \theta_1}{\Delta t}\right|_{\theta=\theta_3} - q\left(1 - \frac{\Delta \theta_1/\Delta t}{\Delta \theta_2/\Delta t}\right)}{m_2\left.\frac{\Delta \theta_2}{\Delta t}\right|_{\theta=\theta_3}}$，其中$q$为量热器内杯、搅拌器、温度计的水当量，$c_1$为水的比热容。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】Calorimeter filled with salt solution cooling: $(m_2c_2 + q)\frac{\Delta \theta_2}{\Delta t} = -\alpha S(\theta_2 - \theta_0)^m$; replaced with pure water of the same volume cooling: $(m_1c_1 + q)\frac{\Delta \theta_1}{\Delta t} = -\alpha S(\theta_1 - \theta_0)^m$. At the same temperature $\theta = \theta_3$, $(m_1c_1 + q)\left.\frac{\Delta \theta_1}{\Delta t}\right|_{\theta=\theta_3} = (m_2c_2 + q)\left.\frac{\Delta \theta_2}{\Delta t}\right|_{\theta=\theta_3}$, rearranged to get $c_2 = \frac{c_1m_1\left.\frac{\Delta \theta_1}{\Delta t}\right|_{\theta=\theta_3} - q\left(1 - \frac{\Delta \theta_1/\Delta t}{\Delta \theta_2/\Delta t}\right)}{m_2\left.\frac{\Delta \theta_2}{\Delta t}\right|_{\theta=\theta_3}}$, where $q$ is the water equivalent of the calorimeter cup, stirrer and thermometer, and $c_1$ is the specific heat capacity of water.
problem_answer: 盐水比热容公式：$\boldsymbol{c_2 = \frac{c_1m_1\left.\frac{\Delta \theta_1}{\Delta t}\right|_{\theta=\theta_3} - q\left(1 - \frac{\Delta \theta_1/\Delta t}{\Delta \theta_2/\Delta t}\right)}{m_2\left.\frac{\Delta \theta_2}{\Delta t}\right|_{\theta=\theta_3}}}$；测量关键：同容积、同冷却条件下比较盐水和纯水的冷却速率。
